sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80034" key="patria/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πατρι-άζω</orth>, <sense id="n80034.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take after one's father</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:3:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
